name: TrailBlazer X200
description: Waterproof Gore-Tex hiking boot. Vibram outsole, 3-season rated. Available in sizes 6-15.

name: TrailBlazer X200 (Wide)
description: Waterproof Gore-Tex hiking boot — wide fit. Same specs as X200, sizes 7-14.

name: Summit Pro Tent
description: 2-person 4-season tent. DAC aluminum poles, 2.1kg, 8-min setup. Includes footprint.

name: Summit Base Tent
description: 2-person 3-season tent. 1.6kg, fiberglass poles. Great value for weekend trips.

name: ClimbTech Pro Harness
description: CE EN12277 certified. Waist 65-90cm, leg 47-65cm. 15kN rated. Dyneema blend webbing.

name: ClimbTech Lite Harness
description: Sport climbing harness. Waist 60-85cm. Pre-threaded buckles. 12kN rated.

name: HydroFlow 1L Bottle
description: Insulated stainless steel. Keeps cold 24h / hot 12h. BPA free. Fits standard cup holders.

name: HydroFlow 750ml Bottle
description: Lightweight insulated bottle. 750ml. Carabiner clip included. BPA free.

name: ArcLite Headlamp 350
description: 350 lumen, IPX4 water resistant. 3 modes + red night vision. 45h runtime on AAA.

name: ArcLite Headlamp 750
description: 750 lumen rechargeable. USB-C. IPX6. Spot + flood beam. 8h on high, 40h on eco.

name: OmniPack 45L
description: Technical 45L pack. Hip belt with pockets. Hydration sleeve. Rain cover included. 1.8kg.

name: DayPack 22L
description: Versatile 22L daypack. Laptop sleeve (15in). Trekking pole loops. 0.75kg.

name: ThermaTech Sleeping Bag (-10C)
description: Down-filled sleeping bag rated to -10C. 800-fill power. Mummy style. 1.1kg.

name: ThermaTech Sleeping Bag (0C)
description: Synthetic fill rated to 0C. Moisture resistant. 1.4kg. Semi-rec shape.

name: TrailPole Carbon (pair)
description: Lightweight carbon fiber trekking poles. Flick-lock adjustable 100-135cm. Foam grips. 240g/pair.

name: GripPole Aluminum (pair)
description: 3-section aluminum poles. Twist-lock. Cork + foam grip combo. 480g/pair.

name: RockWall Shoes (Men)
description: Neutral-profile all-day climbing shoe. Vibram XS Edge sole. Half-sizes available.

name: RockWall Shoes (Women)
description: Women specific last. Slightly downturned for edge performance. Vibram XS Edge.

name: AlphaLayer Base (M)
description: Merino wool blend base layer. 190gsm. Odor resistant. Sizes XS-XXL.

name: AlphaLayer Base (W)
description: Womens merino base layer. Slightly longer back hem. 190gsm. Sizes XS-XXL.

name: StormShell Jacket (M)
description: 3-layer Gore-Tex Pro shell. 20k/20k waterproof/breathable. Pit zips. Helmet-compatible hood.

name: StormShell Jacket (W)
description: Womens fit Gore-Tex Pro shell. Same specs as mens. Pre-curved sleeves.

name: CampChef Stove
description: Canister stove. 2500W output. 4-minute boil (1L). Piezo ignition. 85g.

name: TitanPot 1.5L
description: Hard-anodized aluminum pot. 1.5L. Foldable handles. Compatible with CampChef stoves.

name: CrampTech Crampons
description: 10-point stainless steel crampons. Compatible with B1/B2 boots. 750g/pair.
